text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, I'm observing Fine Motion's dance
practice.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Hm, is my rhythm a touch off? This is more
difficult than I expected.
choice_data_list: It looks like you're having a rough time.
It looks like you're having a rough time.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha, I've had many opportunities to dance in
the past, but it was always ballroom dancing.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
But this is really fun too! Learning something new
always sends my heart aflutter. ♪

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
For example... when I first started, I couldn't
dance this choreography at all!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fine Motion's tone is light, but it couldn't have
been easy. She's surely put a great deal of effort
into improving.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I'm going to keep this up until I've
mastered it!
choice_data_list: I can't wait to see the final routine.
Why not add some personal touches?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Thank you! Once I've perfected it, you're the first
person I want to show it off to! ♪

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
After that, I want to record a video of the dance
to send to my entire family!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I hope they'll enjoy seeing me dance something
less formal!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fine Motion's pure heart is on full display when
she dances. It's almost like watching a fairy in
motion.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
choice_data_list:
You could try adding in some of your ballroom
dancing moves.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Wow, what a splendid idea! It'd be almost like a
cultural fusion!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
In that case, I should sway like this during the
interlude...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Yes! This should fit the song perfectly. ♪

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for the suggestion, Trainer. Just wait
until you can see it action!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A dance routine only Fine Motion can pull off—I
can hardly wait until I get to see the finished
routine.
